summary: Iteration 32: Frontend UI Testing - All features verified working. Tested expandable category buttons on public booking page (/sito), Pacchetti Preimpostati on admin Cards page, and Abbonamenti category in Planning dialog.
passed_tests: PUBLIC BOOKING PAGE (/sito) - Landing Page:
1. Website landing page loads at /sito - PASS
2. 'Mostra listino' button clickable and expands services section - PASS
3. Found 8 landing category buttons (7 service categories + Card & Abbonamenti) - PASS
4. Category buttons have rounded-2xl styling with colored backgrounds and white text - PASS
5. Categories expand/collapse on click - PASS
6. Card & Abbonamenti section visible on landing page - PASS
PUBLIC BOOKING PAGE (/sito) - Booking Step 1:
7. PRENOTA ORA button navigates to booking flow - PASS
8. Found 8 booking category buttons in Step 1 - PASS
9. All 7 categories present: Styling, Piega, Trattamenti, Colore, Permanente, Stiratura, Abbonamenti - PASS
10. Card & Abbonamenti section visible in booking step 1 - PASS
11. Categories expand to show services on click - PASS
12. Categories collapse on second click - PASS
ADMIN CARDS PAGE (/cards):
13. Cards page loads after login - PASS
14. Pacchetti Preimpostati section visible - PASS
15. 6 card templates displayed (Prepagata a scalare €100, Card a scalare €50, abb.colore + piega corti €65, abb.colore + piega lunghi €75, abb. piega corti €40, abb. piega lunghi €60) - PASS
16. 'Nuovo Pacchetto' button visible - PASS
17. Edit/Delete buttons visible on template hover - PASS
ADMIN PLANNING PAGE (/planning):
18. Planning page loads with calendar view - PASS
19. '+ Nuovo' button opens New Appointment dialog - PASS
20. Services section visible in dialog - PASS
21. All 7 categories found in dialog: Styling, Piega, Trattamenti, Colore, Permanente, Stiratura, Abbonamenti - PASS
22. Card & Abbonamenti section visible in dialog - PASS
23. 6 card templates visible in dialog - PASS
24. Promozioni Attive section visible in dialog - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: WebsitePage.jsx: Category buttons correctly styled with rounded-2xl, colored backgrounds (from getCategoryInfo), white text, and chevron icons
WebsitePage.jsx: ServicesSection component (line 71) properly implements expand/collapse with openLandingCats state
WebsitePage.jsx: Booking Step 1 (line 653+) uses groupServicesByCategory() and displays all categories including Card & Abbonamenti
CardsPage.jsx: Pacchetti Preimpostati section (line 301+) fetches from /api/card-templates and displays templates with edit/delete functionality
NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Services grouped by category using sortedServices from groupServicesByCategory()
NewAppointmentDialog.jsx: Card & Abbonamenti section (line 413+) displays cardTemplates passed as prop
categories.js: Defines 8 categories including 'abbonamento' with label 'Abbonamenti' and color '#6366F1'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 verified all requested features: 1) Public booking page at /sito has expandable category BUTTONS (colored, rounded, white text) that expand/collapse services on click. All 7 categories visible plus Card & Abbonamenti section. 2) Admin Cards page at /cards shows Pacchetti Preimpostati section with 6 card templates and CRUD functionality. 3) Admin Planning page New Appointment dialog shows services grouped by categories including Abbonamenti, plus Card & Abbonamenti section with card templates.

public_booking_categories.button_styling: rounded-2xl, colored backgrounds, white text, chevron icons
